description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL-C++ that analyzes C++ code on every push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a weekly schedule. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with read permissions for actions, contents, and security events. Check out the repository, initialize CodeQL tools for C++, install prerequisites, build the project, perform CodeQL analysis, upload results as a build artifact, filter SARIF results, and upload the filtered results.
